ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "institution" INTEGER /* ID of the institution conducting the study */,
  "study_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study */,
  "study_method" TEXT /* Methodology used in the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_funding" TEXT /* Information about funding sources */,
  "ethics_approval" INTEGER /* Whether the study has ethics approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_institution FOREIGN KEY ("institution") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is enrolled in */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "ibd_type" TEXT /* Type of IBS (e.g., IBS-C, IBS-D) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the study */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal from the study, if applicable */,
  "health_history" TEXT /* Detailed health history of the participant */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Current medications of the participant */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contacting the participant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant gave consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement method */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "valid_range_min" REAL /* Minimum valid value for the measurement */,
  "valid_range_max" REAL /* Maximum valid value for the measurement */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pain_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pain data entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement method */,
  "pain_type" TEXT /* Type of pain (e.g., intensity, frequency) */,
  "baseline_value" REAL /* Baseline value of pain */,
  "followup_value" REAL /* Follow-up value of pain */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., self-reported, clinician-assessed) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pain_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pain_data_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pain_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diet_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diet group */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the diet group (e.g., Low FODMAP, Control) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diet group */,
  "diet_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the diet */,
  "diet_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the diet for the group */,
  "diet_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the diet for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diet_groups_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group assignment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diet group */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment to the group */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assignment (e.g., random, clinical decision) */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_assignments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_assignments_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES diet_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical analysis */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "pain_type" TEXT /* Type of pain (e.g., intensity, frequency) */,
  "low_fodmap_mean_diff" REAL /* Mean difference in the low FODMAP group */,
  "control_mean_diff" REAL /* Mean difference in the control group */,
  "difference_mean" REAL /* Difference in mean values between the low FODMAP and control groups */,
  "ci_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "ci_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the difference */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the statistical analysis (e.g., t-test, ANOVA) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level for the analysis (e.g., 95%, 99%) */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analyses_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_creator" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., university, hospital) */,
  "institution_funding" TEXT /* Information about funding sources for the institution */,
  "institution_website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication appeared */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
